build.beforeDevCommand: bun run setup:ffmpeg && bun run vite dev --port 5173
build.beforeBuildCommand: bun run setup:ffmpeg && bun run vite build

security.csp: default-src 'self'; img-src 'self' data: blob: asset: https://asset.localhost; style-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline'; script-src 'self'; font-src 'self' data:; object-src 'none'; base-uri 'self'; frame-ancestors 'none'; form-action 'none'

bundle.longDescription: EasyClip is a step-by-step wizard for trimming video and audio files without learning complex software. All cuts are lossless via FFmpeg stream-copy and concat-demuxer.
